description_long: This object is a pixelated chainsaw with a predominantly red rectangular body and a long, silver cutting bar featuring a toothed chain. The main housing is blocky, with visible black and gray details, including a prominent black handle at the rear and a smaller black guard above the bar. The left side displays a metallic plate with bolts, while the right side has a circular vented cover, likely for the engine. The front of the chainsaw shows a gray grille, possibly for air intake or exhaust. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear separation between the handle, body, and cutting components, and the color scheme is dominated by red, black, and metallic gray.
description: A blocky, red chainsaw with a silver toothed bar, black handle, and metallic details. The design is utilitarian and visually distinct with clear functional parts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red body, black rear handle, silver cutting bar with teeth, and a metallic plate with bolts on the side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gray grille, the narrow profile of the bar, and the top of the red housing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the circular vented cover, black handle, and the full length of the cutting bar.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the black handle, the top of the red housing, and the alignment of the bar with the body.
attribute_handle_design: Two handles: a large black rear handle and a smaller black top guard handle, both rectangular and utilitarian, with no visible ergonomic padding.
